UC-REALTIME-ASSIST.action: Receives real-time AI-generated answers during video call
UC-REALTIME-ASSIST.goal: Pass technical interviews with AI assistance
UC-REALTIME-ASSIST.acceptance: AI captures audio stream, detects questions via LLM detector, generates contextual answers, and displays them in an always-on-top overlay within seconds

UC-CONTINUOUS-STT.action: Continuously transcribes speaker audio via WhisperX Docker or local Whisper
UC-CONTINUOUS-STT.goal: Produce a rolling text buffer of the last N seconds of speech for question detection
UC-CONTINUOUS-STT.acceptance: Audio is resampled 24kHz to 16kHz, sent in overlapping 3s chunks every 0.5s to STT, hallucinations are filtered out, and transcription entries are timestamped in a rolling window

UC-QUESTION-DETECT.action: Periodically sends rolling transcription window to a fast LLM (gpt-4o-mini) to detect new questions
UC-QUESTION-DETECT.goal: Automatically identify when the interviewer asks a new question and trigger answer generation
UC-QUESTION-DETECT.acceptance: Detector runs at configurable interval (500ms-2s), deduplicates against last 10 questions, and dispatches detected questions to the main LLM

UC-PROVIDER-SELECT.action: Selects AI provider mode: Cloud, BYOK (Gemini), OpenRouter, or Local (Ollama)
UC-PROVIDER-SELECT.goal: Use preferred AI inference method based on cost, speed, and privacy needs
UC-PROVIDER-SELECT.acceptance: Each provider mode initializes its own session, STT pipeline, and conversation history; switching modes cleanly tears down the previous session

UC-PROFILE-SELECT.action: Selects a session profile (Interview, Sales, Meeting, etc.) and optionally provides custom context
UC-PROFILE-SELECT.goal: Receive answers tailored to the specific conversation type and user background
UC-PROFILE-SELECT.acceptance: System prompt adapts to selected profile; custom prompt text is appended to the base profile prompt

UC-VISION-ANALYSIS.action: Triggers manual or automatic screenshot capture during a session
UC-VISION-ANALYSIS.goal: Get AI analysis of on-screen content (code, diagrams, slides) alongside audio context
UC-VISION-ANALYSIS.acceptance: Screenshot is captured from screen share stream, encoded as JPEG, sent to vision-capable model, and streamed response is displayed in overlay

UC-MIRROR-MODE.action: Toggles mirror mode via Ctrl+Shift+M hotkey
UC-MIRROR-MODE.goal: Read AI responses reflected in a mirror or secondary display without the interviewer noticing
UC-MIRROR-MODE.acceptance: Response container CSS transform flips horizontally; toggle persists in preferences

UC-OVERLAY-CONTROL.action: Controls overlay window with global keyboard shortcuts
UC-OVERLAY-CONTROL.goal: Quickly show/hide, move, scroll, and toggle click-through on the hints overlay
UC-OVERLAY-CONTROL.acceptance: Global shortcuts work across all apps: Ctrl+Arrow moves window, Ctrl+\ toggles visibility, Ctrl+M toggles click-through, Ctrl+Shift+E emergency erases all content

UC-DIAGNOSTICS.action: Runs diagnostic tests from OpenRouter settings panel
UC-DIAGNOSTICS.goal: Verify WhisperX Docker connectivity, OpenRouter API key validity, and model availability before starting a session
UC-DIAGNOSTICS.acceptance: Diagnostics panel shows pass/fail for each subsystem with latency and error details

UC-EMERGENCY-ERASE.action: Presses Ctrl+Shift+E to instantly clear all displayed content
UC-EMERGENCY-ERASE.goal: Immediately hide AI assistance if the interviewer looks at the screen
UC-EMERGENCY-ERASE.acceptance: All response history and transcription display is cleared within one frame; overlay becomes blank

FunctionalRequirements.FR-AUDIO-CAPTURE: Capture system audio (speaker loopback) via Electron desktopCapturer and optionally microphone input
FunctionalRequirements.FR-AUDIO-RESAMPLE: Resample captured 24kHz mono PCM to 16kHz using linear interpolation with remainder carry-over
FunctionalRequirements.FR-AUDIO-RING-BUFFER: Maintain a time-stamped ring buffer of PCM16k chunks with configurable lookback window (default 3s)
FunctionalRequirements.FR-CONTINUOUS-TRANSCRIPTION: Stream accumulated audio to WhisperX Docker (or local Whisper) at configurable intervals (default 500ms) with overlapping 3s chunks
FunctionalRequirements.FR-HALLUCINATION-FILTER: Filter out common STT hallucination patterns (subtitles, subscribe, music, applause, short fragments) before adding to transcription buffer
FunctionalRequirements.FR-ROLLING-WINDOW: Maintain a rolling transcription buffer of configurable duration (10-30s, default 15s) for question detection context
FunctionalRequirements.FR-QUESTION-DETECTOR: Send rolling window text to a fast cheap LLM (default gpt-4o-mini via OpenRouter) at configurable frequency (500ms-2s) to detect new questions
FunctionalRequirements.FR-QUESTION-DEDUP: Deduplicate detected questions against the last 10 detected questions using case-insensitive string comparison
FunctionalRequirements.FR-OPENROUTER-CHAT: Send detected questions to configurable main LLM via OpenRouter API with streaming SSE response, conversation history (last 20 messages), and system prompt
FunctionalRequirements.FR-OPENROUTER-VISION: Send JPEG screenshots to a vision-capable model via OpenRouter for screen content analysis with streaming response
FunctionalRequirements.FR-GEMINI-BYOK: Support Gemini API with user-provided API key for multimodal audio+vision inference
FunctionalRequirements.FR-CLOUD-MODE: Support managed cloud backend via WebSocket for users without API keys (usage-limited)
FunctionalRequirements.FR-LOCAL-OLLAMA: Support fully local inference via Ollama with VAD-based speech detection
FunctionalRequirements.FR-GROQ-INFERENCE: Support Groq API as a fast inference backend with per-model character usage limits
FunctionalRequirements.FR-THINKING-STRIP: Strip <think>...</think> tags from model responses before display
FunctionalRequirements.FR-STREAMING-DISPLAY: Stream LLM responses token-by-token to the overlay as they arrive via SSE
FunctionalRequirements.FR-WHISPERX-DOCKER: Support WhisperX Docker container with configurable URL, model (large-v3, large-v3-turbo, medium, small), language, and Silero VAD
FunctionalRequirements.FR-LOCAL-WHISPER: Support local Whisper via @huggingface/transformers on CPU with model selection (tiny, base, small)
FunctionalRequirements.FR-WAV-ENCODING: Convert PCM16k buffers to WAV format with proper RIFF header for WhisperX API upload
FunctionalRequirements.FR-OVERLAY-WINDOW: Render transparent, frameless, always-on-top, content-protected Electron window as the overlay
FunctionalRequirements.FR-CLICK-THROUGH: Toggle mouse event pass-through (click-through mode) via global shortcut
FunctionalRequirements.FR-MIRROR-DISPLAY: Horizontally flip the response container via CSS transform for mirror reading
FunctionalRequirements.FR-GLOBAL-SHORTCUTS: Register configurable global keyboard shortcuts for window movement, visibility, click-through, screenshot, scroll, emergency erase, and mirror toggle
FunctionalRequirements.FR-MARKDOWN-RENDER: Render AI responses with markdown formatting, syntax highlighting (highlight.js), bold, lists, and code blocks
FunctionalRequirements.FR-RESPONSE-HISTORY: Navigate between previous AI responses via Ctrl+[ and Ctrl+] shortcuts
FunctionalRequirements.FR-PERSISTENT-STORAGE: Store configuration, credentials, preferences, keybinds, and usage limits in JSON files in OS-appropriate config directory
FunctionalRequirements.FR-MODEL-BROWSER: Fetch and display available OpenRouter models grouped by provider with pricing info
FunctionalRequirements.FR-DETECTION-TUNING: Allow user to configure detection window size (10-30s), check frequency (500ms-2s), and STT interval (0.5-2s)

NonFunctionalRequirements.NFR-LATENCY: End-to-end latency from question asked to first answer token displayed should be under 3 seconds with WhisperX Docker + fast OpenRouter model
NonFunctionalRequirements.NFR-STEALTH: Overlay window must be invisible to screen sharing: content-protected, hidden from taskbar (Windows), visible on all workspaces (macOS)
NonFunctionalRequirements.NFR-PRIVACY: API keys stored locally on disk, never transmitted except to their respective API endpoints; no telemetry
NonFunctionalRequirements.NFR-CROSS-PLATFORM: Application must run on Windows, macOS, and Linux via Electron with platform-specific adaptations for audio capture and shortcuts
NonFunctionalRequirements.NFR-RESOURCE: Local Whisper runs on CPU; WhisperX Docker requires NVIDIA GPU with CUDA; overlay should consume minimal CPU when idle
NonFunctionalRequirements.NFR-RESILIENCE: Session initialization validates API connectivity and STT availability before activating; graceful fallback on errors
NonFunctionalRequirements.NFR-CONVERSATION-LIMIT: Conversation history capped at 20 messages to control token usage and latency
